news.t: Trump to announce discount drug pricing expansion, White House official says
Could pressure to make money faster kill the next lifesaving pill?
Trump announces 100% tariffs on pharmaceutical drugs, beginning October 1

holdings.infoBox: FTXH is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 7.80%, AbbVie at 6.94%, Johnson & Johnson at 6.89%, Merck & Co. at 6.74%, and Bristol-Myers Squibb Company at 6.55%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Pharmaceuticals ETF (FTXH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq US Smart Pharmaceuticals index. The fund tracks the 30 most liquid US pharmaceutical companies, weighted according to factors related to value, volatility, and growth. FTXH was launched on Sep 20, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Trump to announce discount drug pricing expansion, White House official says
data.text: U.S. President Donald Trump will ‌announce a dramatic expansion of TrumpRx.gov, a government-backed website offering discounted prescription drugs under his ​administration's pricing deal, on Monday, ...

data.title: Could pressure to make money faster kill the next lifesaving pill?
data.text: When activist investors take a stake in a pharmaceutical company, markets often cheer. The expectation is leaner operations, sharper strategy and higher stock prices.

data.title: Trump announces 100% tariffs on pharmaceutical drugs, beginning October 1
data.text: President Donald Trump said Thursday that he will put import taxes of 100% on pharmaceutical drugs, 50% on kitchen cabinets and bathroom vanities, 30% on upholstered furniture and 25% on heavy trucks ...

data.title: ETF Spotlight: Pharmaceuticals driven higher by Pfizer
data.text: CNBC'S Morgan Brennan takes a look at pharmaceutical as Pfizer's positive vaccine news has led the sector higher.
